name: CardsView

aliases.name: CardDescription
aliases.type: { card : Cards.Card, size : CardsView.Size, svg : Svg.Svg msg }

aliases.name: CardTextDescription
aliases.type: { card : Cards.Card, size : CardsView.Size, svg : String.String }

values.name: cardToClickableSvg
values.comment:
Convert a `Card` and a height into a clickable `Svg`, which invokes `msg`
when clicked.

values.name: cardToPrettyString
values.comment:
Turn a `Card` into a pretty string.

e.g. `cardToPretyString(Card Spades Queen) -> "Queen of Spades"`

values.name: cardToSvg
values.comment: Convert a `Card` and a height into `Svg`.
